selected.reason: This frame captures the opening title slide with a clear teaching artifact: the topic '找工作技巧: Show, don't tell' (Job Search Tips: Show, don't tell) and a supporting statement '然后收到100多个job offer' (Then received over 100 job offers), which sets up a key principle and outcome for the course.
